This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
n8n contains a sanitizer bypass vulnerability in the legacy expression evaluator's computed-member handler. An authenticated user with workflow create or modify permissions can craft a malicious expression to bypass the sanitizer and achieve host-level code execution as the n8n process. The legacy expression engine is the default in affected versions. Fixed in n8n 1.123.64, 2.29.8, and 2.30.1.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m7jc-p4hf-xhwq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:01:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m7jc-p4hf-xhwq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m7jc-p4hf-xhwq"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-22T12:18:19Z", "published_at": "2026-07-22T12:32:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65591", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-sanitizer-bypass-remote-code-execution", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m7jc-p4hf-xhwq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Legacy Expression Evaluator Sanitizer Bypass Leads to Authenticated Code Execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:01:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m7jc-p4hf-xhwq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.64"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-22T22:01:27Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: Legacy Expression Evaluator Sanitizer Bypass Leads to Authenticated Code Execution
